CustomField.description: Stable signal-identity key enforcing at-most-once delivery per (instance, key) pair. For routed signals with a caller-supplied idempotency key this holds SHA-256-hex('I:' + instanceId + '::' + callerKey), scoping dedup to the instance. For pre-arrival (unrouted) keyed captures it holds SHA-256-hex('C:' + lower(correlationKey) + '::' + callerKey); on redelivery it is rewritten to the instance-scoped 'I:' hash so a later routed duplicate dedups against it. For unrouted signals without a caller key it holds the platform-event EventUuid. Null for keyless signals (at-least-once). Multiple nulls are permitted (Salesforce unique fields allow multiple nulls).
CustomField.label: Signal Key
